_meta.task: Brief-level feature re-diff — every concrete product promise in the umbrella brief (rgBOQh31p3) checked against the filed corpus (feature-map.txt 575 story titles + breakdown/*/plan.json). Browser extension excluded (KNOWN-missing, ENG-2689/2690).

features.where_or_gap: staging 'Autonomy dial, trust tiers & batch review queue' — Autonomy Dial enforcement server-side policy verdict per tenant+space.

features.where_or_gap: api 'The Prompt Composer & enrichment' 4 stories; ai 'Prompt Composer backend — compose skill + Memory + wiki RAG into a portable prompt'; ui Builder Base+Delta + Five-AI export.

features.where_or_gap: ui 'Skill Viewer: typed items, per-block provenance, injection slots' + 'Builder Base+Delta: fork/edit, toggle, autosave, <50ms weave'.

features.feature: Improve-with-AI woven into the editor
features.where_or_gap: ai 'Improve-with-AI backend'; ui 'Improve panel: five result states + non-optimistic apply'.

features.feature: Task-first wizard prompt builder (say the task → interview → scan marketplace → compose)
features.where_or_gap: PARTIAL GAP: ai has 'Wizard task-first prompt-builder AI-assist backend' but NO UI story for the wizard interview experience ('do you want this?' Q&A → marketplace scan → compose). ui only has 'Task Box two-mode' (first-run morph) and the catalog-first Builder — neither is the guided task-first wizard flow. Frontend surface unstoried.

features.feature: Ask-your-wiki (RAG retrieval Q&A over the wiki)
features.where_or_gap: api 'Wiki omnibox — instant search (Free) + Ask (£7 proxy)'; ui 'Your Wiki: omnibox (search+Ask)'; knowledge hybrid retrieval.

features.feature: Outbound memory sync — sync Orvex Memory OUT to vendor native memories (master copy → replicas)
features.where_or_gap: PARTIAL GAP: workgraph provides the interop SURFACE — 'Claude memory-tool backend (FR-MEM27)' + 'KG interop adapter read+write (FR-MEM16)' — which the addendum maps outbound-sync onto. But no story orchestrates ACTIVE outbound push-sync of the api Memory product to vendor native memories (per-vendor sync loop, conflict policy, private-memory exclusion). The 'sync out' orchestration itself is unstoried (brief flags it '[NEW — not yet in canon]').

features.feature: Orvex rating — multi-factor (structural quality + popularity/usage + upvotes) on every marketplace prompt
features.where_or_gap: PARTIAL GAP: ai does 'Orvex rating — structural-quality AI scoring factor (ai's share)' and api 'Marketplace, social & append-only reputation ledger' covers upvotes/reputation, but NO story assembles the multi-factor COMPOSITE score nor DISPLAYS the Orvex rating on the catalog (Discover/marketplace-home ui story shows no rating). Aggregation owner + popularity/usage weighting + catalog display unassigned. The '(ai's share)' phrasing signals a composite that is never stitched together.

features.feature: Private memories + per-use consumption consent
features.where_or_gap: api 'Private-Memory guard + per-use consent + egress audit' + '3-state privacy + consent pipeline + exclusion contract'; ui 'Sensitive-field consent UX + Enrichment Policy setting'.

features.feature: Personal-Data Guard — screen PII before anything reaches a third-party AI
features.where_or_gap: ai 'PII redactor + secret scrubber outbound middleware, fail-closed strictest policy'.

features.feature: AI-privacy setup — verify the connected assistant won't train on your data
features.where_or_gap: GAP: only Orvex's OWN 'no-train EU-resident provider config' exists (workgraph janitor step-API) — that governs Orvex's model providers, not the user's connected assistant. No user-facing AI-privacy setup that verifies/guides the connected assistant's training posture. ui 'Connections & MCP setup' is connection wiring, not no-train verification. Distinct brief promise, unstoried.
